name: ironmind
description: Small native CPU inference engine for one local agentic model at a time.

scripts.check: node --check ./bin/ironmind.mjs && node --check ./tools/inspect-gguf.mjs && node --check ./tools/tokenize.mjs && node --check ./tools/map-tensors.mjs && node --check ./tools/eval-suite.mjs && node ./tools/test-foundations.mjs && node ./tools/eval-suite.mjs stats
